heading: Irrigation projects; deposit of assessments as trust fund; disposition of fund
label: 385a Irrigation projects; deposit of assessments as trust fund; disposition of fund
text: Effective , collections made from water users on each Indian irrigation project on account of assessments levied to meet the cost of operating and maintaining such project shall be deposited into the Treasury for credit to a trust-fund account pursuant to , and shall be available for expenditure in carrying out the purposes for which collected.August 7, 1946section 1321 of title 31
